name: Apple Orange Spice Muffins (Ww)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees F.
2. In a small bowl, sift together flour, baking powder, cinnamon, baking soda, salt, nutmeg, and cloves. Stir in instant nonfat dry milk.
3. In a mixing bowl, cream margarine with brown sugar until smooth. Add egg yolk and beat on medium speed until thick and creamy.
4. Add apples, raisins, apple juice, and orange peel to the mixture; stir to combine.
5. Gradually add flour mixture to the batter and beat until well blended.
6. In a separate bowl, beat egg white with cream of tartar until stiff but not dry.
7. Gently fold the beaten egg white into the batter.
8. Spray eight 2 1/2 inch diameter nonstick muffin pan cups with nonstick cooking spray.
9. Spoon about 1/8 cup of batter into each sprayed cup (each will be about two-thirds full). Partially fill remaining cups with water to prevent the pan from burning or warping.
10. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes, or until a cake tester inserted in the center comes out clean.
11. Remove the pan from the oven and carefully drain off any excess water (be careful as it will be boiling hot). Transfer muffins to a wire rack and let cool. Makes 4 servings of 2 muffins each!
